roleGuard.title: Access denied
roleGuard.description: You need administrator privileges to access this page.

projectDialog.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the <name>{name}</name> project? This action cannot be undone.

validation.name: Please enter a name
validation.slugPattern: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens are allowed
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

generic.requestError: An error occurred while processing your request
generic.loginRequiredRefresh: You must be signed in. Please refresh the page.
generic.sessionDeleteError: An error occurred while deleting the session.

solutions.sessionMissing: Session info missing. Please restart from the beginning.
solutions.companyNameMissing: Company name is missing. Please go back to step 1 and enter the company name.
solutions.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.

pmRecommend.analyzing: Analyzing the best PM for your prototype
pmRecommend.nextHint: Click the Next button below to select a PM.
pmRecommend.failDesc: A temporary error occurred. Please try again.

pmSelect.loadingDesc: Searching for PM profiles optimized for your prototype
pmSelect.recommendBanner: AI has recommended the best PM based on your selected prototype. Higher match rates indicate better project success probability.

pmComposition.nextHint: This PM's default team (agents, skills, MCP, hooks) will be automatically selected in the next agent configuration step. PM team items are locked and cannot be removed, but you can freely add more items.

agents.pmLockBanner: {pmName}'s default team items have been automatically applied. Locked items cannot be removed, but you can freely add additional items.
agents.catalogRecBanner: Agents and skills have been recommended based on your selected prototype catalog. Adjust as needed.
agents.defaultBanner: Review the agent configuration for your selected prototype and adjust as needed.
agents.ticketDesc: Select the platform to manage issues/tickets.
agents.ticketLockedByPm: {pmName} has locked {label}. Other ticket sources cannot be selected.
agents.ticketRequiredAlert: Please select 1 ticket source (Linear or Notion)

platform.description: Select the Agent platform to run your generated solution.
platform.comingSoonNote: Gemini CLI, Cursor, and Codex support will be available in future updates.
platform.claudeCodeDesc: AI coding agent based on Anthropic Claude
platform.geminiCliDesc: CLI agent based on Google Gemini

os.description: Select the OS environment to unzip and run the project. A launcher script for your selected environment will be included.
os.wslGuideDesc: WSL2 is Microsoft's official feature for running a Linux environment on Windows.
os.wslStep2: After restarting your PC, open the Ubuntu app
os.wslStep3: Set username and password, then you're done
os.wsl2Desc: Windows Subsystem for Linux 2 — Claude Code officially recommended environment

env.authApiKeyDesc: Enter the sk-ant-... key issued from Anthropic Console directly.
env.authOAuthDesc: For Claude Pro/Max subscribers only. When you run bash start.sh, claude login will proceed automatically.
env.oauthNote: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY will not be included in .env. Browser login will start automatically when you run bash start.sh.
env.nonAsciiWarning: Non-ASCII characters (Korean, emoji, etc.) are automatically removed. Enter only English letters and numbers.
env.missingKeysAlert: {count} required key(s) not yet configured. Enter values or mark as "Enter later".
env.deferredKeysNote: {count} key(s) to enter later — you can add them in the final confirmation step.
env.trackingDesc: Select how to automatically trigger local Claude when Linear issue status changes.
env.cfNote: Run bash scripts/setup-tunnel.sh after unzipping to auto-install cloudflared.
env.pollingNote: Run python3 scripts/linear_watcher.py to poll Linear every 30 seconds. No webhook server needed.
env.securityNote: The keys entered are saved in .env in the ZIP file. Do not share the ZIP file. Refer to the docs/api-keys/ folder in the ZIP if unsure.
env.securityNoteOAuth: In browser OAuth mode, the Anthropic key is not included in .env. claude login will start automatically when you run bash start.sh.

roi.title: ROI Comparison
roi.desc: Compare the cost of building the same solution with traditional staffing vs. ClickEye.
roi.rateNote: * Adjusting rates does not change the administrator's standard values. Only applies to this session. Formula version: {version}

simpleConfirm.submitHint: Creating a project will save your solution configuration

confirmation.deferredDesc: These are keys you chose to enter later. Enter them now or edit the .env file directly after creating the project.

setupGuide.title: Solution created!
setupGuide.subtitle: Follow the steps below to set up your local development environment
setupGuide.workflowDesc1: bash start.sh → Environment check · Background service start · Auto exit
setupGuide.workflowDesc2Wsl: bash scripts/install-service.sh → Register systemd service (auto-recover after WSL2 restart)
setupGuide.workflowDesc3Wsl: ClickEye Web → AI Team → Approve task (Todo)
setupGuide.workflowDesc3: ClickEye Web → AI Team → Approve task (Todo)
setupGuide.workflowDesc4Wsl: Local pipeline automatically calls Claude to write code
setupGuide.workflowDesc4: Local pipeline automatically calls Claude to write code
setupGuide.workflowSlide: Team sharing slide guide: docs/setup-guide.pptx in ZIP
setupGuide.projectPageHint: Download ZIP and check integration status on the project page
setupGuide.step1Desc: Click the "Download ZIP" button on the project page
setupGuide.step2DescWsl: Unzip to your desired folder in WSL2 Ubuntu terminal
setupGuide.step2Desc: Unzip the ZIP file to your desired folder
setupGuide.step2NoteWsl: Run from the WSL terminal instead of double-clicking the ZIP in Windows Explorer
setupGuide.step3Desc: Checks environment, starts services in the background, then exits automatically. The pipeline continues running even after closing the terminal.
setupGuide.step4DescWsl: Services will automatically recover after WSL2 shutdown or restart. Register as a systemd user service.
setupGuide.step4Desc: Once ClickEye Web AI Team registers a task, the local pipeline will run automatically.
setupGuide.step4NoteWsl: Optional but recommended for stable operation
